latest.title: Minha primeira semana com o AWS Builder Center: Como foi praticar a coragem de encarar algo novo?
latest.description: Minha primeira semana no programa de líderes estudantis da AWS foi um mix de frio na barriga, muito estudo sobre Cloud e a alegria de conectar com pessoas do Brasil inteiro. Escrevi um breve relato sobre essa experiência, minha transição acadêmica e como estou unindo cérebro e coração para criar conteúdos tech com a minha cara. Vem ler! 🚀

latest.title: Por que engenheiros industriais deveriam aprender cloud computing
latest.description: Uma análise sobre como cloud vem ganhando espaço dentro da engenharia industrial e por que isso está se tornando cada vez mais relevante.

latest.title: Taming the Deduction Beast: Automating the CPG Back Office with Agentic AI
latest.description: For Fortune 2000 CPG companies, back-office processing consumes 4.2–7.35% of revenue—among the highest of any industry. Fragmented global markets, complex retail channels, and billions in trade promotions drive immense complexity. With 60–70% of activities being repetitive and manual, the Agentic AI opportunity is extraordinary. AWS customers already achieve 5–10X productivity gains in deductions, reconciliation, and vendor onboarding.

latest.title: Multi-Agent Reliability on AWS: Building SRE Infrastructure for A2A + MCP Production Systems
latest.description: Amazon Bedrock AgentCore now supports A2A natively. That means multi-agent systems — where orchestrator agents delegate to specialist sub-agents via the Agent-to-Agent protocol — are a first-class deployment pattern on AWS.hat also means the reliability engineering challenge I've been anticipating for the past year is now a production problem for AWS customers.

latest.title: AWS Builder Center HELP: Guia do aluno
latest.description: Um breve tutorial de como utilizar a plataforma para alavancar seu potencial tech e três lições que gostaria do compartilhar sobre o AWS Builder Center.

latest.title: Como estou montando meu portfólio de TI sem gastar nada
latest.description: Cansada de só ver teoria na faculdade? Eu também. Nesse artigo, eu mostro como estou usando as abas de Workshops e Spaces da AWS para construir meu primeiro portfólio de Cloud sem risco de cobranças no cartão e com foco total no que o mercado pede.

latest.title: AWS MCP Servers Part 3: Build Smarter, Query Faster
latest.description: From raw data to intelligent insights — How AWS MCP Servers are transforming AI/ML workflows and data engineering

latest.title: Three ML Concepts Every AWS Builder Should Actually Understand
latest.description: A technical breakdown of 3 ML concepts often covered in AWS MLE interviews: gradient descent, random forests, and flash-attention–and their applications in production-side AWS tools.

latest.title: Kiro - Gerenciamento e Governança
latest.description:
Galera... vamos falar mais um pouco sobre o Kiro e dessa vez o tema é gerenciamento e governança. Que eu vejo ser um grande diferencial que temos aqui.

#BRLink #IngramMicro #aws #awsambassador #awscommunitybuilder #kiro #agenticai

latest.title: Engenharia de Software, carreira e cloud: por que decidi olhar para AWS ainda na faculdade
latest.description:
Sou Vithor Torelli, estudante de Engenharia de Software, e neste artigo compartilho por que decidi começar a olhar para cloud computing ainda durante a faculdade.

Percebi cedo que tecnologia vai muito além do código e que entender infraestrutura, escalabilidade e mercado pode fazer diferença na carreira. Talvez essa reflexão também faça sentido para quem está começando agora.

#AWS #CloudComputing #EngenhariaDeSoftware #CarreiraTech #Tecnologia #AWSBuilderCenter

trending.title: AWS Summit London Attendee Exclusive: Builder Question of the Day
trending.description: If you're attending the AWS Summit in London, come say hi at the Developer Community Zone in the Expo and get involved in our Builder Question of the Day challenge!

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: NeuroVoice
trending.description: Small moments, repeated daily, reveal what single snapshots never can - patterns that quietly signal neurological risk. NeuroVoice is a multimodal Parkinson’s screening platform that tracks pattern over time to detect subtle neurological changes early.

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: ASET – Academic Safety and Evidencing Truth
trending.description: ASET (Academic Safety and Evidencing Truth) is an AI-powered claim verification platform built on AWS that verifies scientific claims against 1.2M+ peer-reviewed papers across 8 domains — and automatically fetches and permanently stores new papers from arXiv, PubMed, etc. when gaps are found, making the knowledge base self-growing with every query. From typed claims to YouTube videos and uploaded documents, ASET delivers evidence-backed trust scores in under 10 seconds.

trending.title: Como estou montando meu portfólio de TI sem gastar nada
trending.description: Cansada de só ver teoria na faculdade? Eu também. Nesse artigo, eu mostro como estou usando as abas de Workshops e Spaces da AWS para construir meu primeiro portfólio de Cloud sem risco de cobranças no cartão e com foco total no que o mercado pede.

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: Global Impact AI Navigator
trending.description: Global Impact AI Navigator (GIAN) is a multi-agent AI platform built on Amazon Bedrock that transforms a raw idea into a complete strategic package in under 60 seconds — SWOT diagnostic, live-grounded funding discovery, personalized roadmap, and a context-aware advisor. Designed for innovators in emerging markets, it democratizes access to the strategic guidance that usually requires expensive consultants or elite networks.

trending.title: Your Cloud Journey Starts Here—With AWS
trending.description:
🚀 Ready to start your cloud journey?
Explore how Amazon Web Services can help you build real-world skills, work on projects, and unlock new opportunities.
Start small, stay consistent, and grow with the cloud ☁️

#students #https://builder.aws.com/start?trk=7cff29b7-5b80-4b00-adf1-e79ab5ac6509&sc_channel=el

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: Perspective
trending.description: Perspective is an AI-powered mental health companion that extracts clinical insight from free-form speech — no mood scales required. Using 4-cluster parallel extraction on Amazon Bedrock, validated against the Subjective Units of Distress Scale (SUDS), Work and Social Adjustment Scale (WSAS), PHQ-9, and GAD-7, it serves undiagnosed users and diagnosed patients alike. Clinician-validated by three practising doctors. Built on AWS serverless with Kiro.

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: Veloquity - The Agentic Evidence Intelligent Platform Turning Raw Feedback into Evidence-Driven Decisions
trending.description: Decisions don’t fail from too little data - they fail from too much noise. Veloquity, an agentic evidence intelligence platform, filters that noise by transforming fragmented feedback into validated evidence and delivering explainable, prioritized recommendations with full source-to-decision traceability that guides human decisions. READ ON TO SEE HOW.

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: RetainIQ
trending.description: Detect knowledge concentration risk before it costs you. RetainIQ scores every critical topic 0–100 and triggers AI interventions. Zero docs effort required.
